lunar_stone.title: Find and mine Lunar Stone from underground meteor craters — rare Celestisynth ore source

zephyr_deposit.title: Locate a Zephyr Deposit at Y≥130 in mountain biomes — Celestisynth sky-ore, requires Y=130+ elevation

subtitle.text: Lunar Stone below the earth. Zephyr Deposits above it. Solar Crystal in the Nether. Three sources. One chain.

description: CH.15 · CELESTISYNTH: FIRST CONTACT
▸ Celestisynth is a late-game material chain
that produces Celestial Netherite — the highest tier metal.
It requires three ore types from three different locations:
Lunar Stone (deep underground), Zephyr Deposit (high mountains),
Solar Crystal (Nether dimension).
Ch15 is first contact. Ch16 completes the chain.
◈ LUNAR STONE
└ Location: underground crater formations
(look for unusual circular cave structures — meteor impact sites)
└ Depth: mid-to-deep Y levels (Y=0 to Y=40 range)
└ Appearance: dark metallic ore in crater floor/walls
└ Drop: celestisynth:lunar_scrap (raw material for chain)
└ Fortune III: increases scrap yield per ore
└ Crater tip: check surrounding stone for signs of impact
(craters have a signature rounded burn/blast radius in stone)
◈ ZEPHYR DEPOSIT
└ Location: Y≥130 in mountain biomes (Terralith: Stony Peaks,
Alpine, and high Terralith mountain variants)
└ Appearance: light crystalline ore, pale blue/white
└ Spawn: generates in exposed cliff faces and peak formations
└ Elytra approach: fly to peak, scan cliff faces for deposits
└ Drop: celestisynth:zephyr_fragment (or similar — check JEI)
└ Height requirement is strict: below Y=130 it does not generate
◈ SOLAR CRYSTAL (NETHER)
└ Location: Nether dimension — Basalt Deltas and high lava areas
└ Third input for the Celestisynth chain (Ch16 deep dive)
└ Prep: stock fire resistance potions before Nether Celestisynth run
└ Full chain: all 3 inputs → Celestial Netherite Ingot (Ch16)
▸ The materials fell from space.
The Lunar Stone arrived in a crater.
The Zephyr Deposit formed where sky meets stone.
The Solar Crystal crystallized from Nether heat.
Three kinds of extreme environment,
three materials that survived them.
The chain that comes from combining them
is called Celestial Netherite.
The name is accurate.
▶ Find and mine Lunar Stone from a crater [check]
▶ Locate a Zephyr Deposit at Y≥130 [check]
◇ Ch16 (The Long Road Home) covers the full Celestisynth forge:
all three inputs combined → Celestial Netherite Ingot,
then armor/tool set and enchantment.
Start sourcing all three materials in Ch15.
The chain requires specific quantities per piece.
More is better — over-farm in Ch15 to enable Ch16 fast.
